title: SuperSimpleTips
description: SuperSimpleTips - Show Random Hints On The Loading Screen.
body:
**Show Random Hints On The Loading Screen.**

# How Does It Work?
**On The Singleplayer World Loading Screen, A Hint Will Be Randomly Selected From A Small List, And Displayed In The Bottom-Left Hand Corner Of The Screen.**

# Installation
**To get Started, Simply Drop The .jar File Of The Latest Release In Your Mods Folder.**

Thanks To [This Repo](https://github.com/Darkhax-Minecraft/Tips) For The Tip Text.
